content.title: Assessment
description: This section allows users to create specified indices on selected satellite collections and view the results along with their statistics.
Open the Assessments tool from the left toolbar.
Select the required satellite image collection from the 'Select Collection' dropdown.
Choose the required index from the 'Select Indices' dropdown (e.g., NDVI, NDWI, etc.)
Enter the desired Cloud Cover (%) value between 1 and 100.
Select the required Month and Year.
Choose the available imagery date from the 'Select Date' field.
Click 'Run Assessments' to generate the selected indices.
Once processing is complete, the generated assessment layer will be displayed on the map.
The assessment result will also be available under the 'Assessments' section in the Layers panel, where it can be viewed or hidden as required.
